<user>
Fix the following bug in the django/django repository:

model_to_dict() should return an empty dict for an empty list of fields.

When called as model_to_dict(instance, fields=[]) the function should return an empty dict, because no fields were requested. But it returns all fields instead.

The problem is the condition:
  if fields and f.name not in fields:
which should be:
  if fields is not None and f.name not in fields:

Please locate the relevant code and apply the fix.
</user>
<assistant>
<think>

</think>
<tool_call>shell
<arg_key>command</arg_key>
<arg_value>grep -rn "def model_to_dict" /repo</arg_value>
</tool_call>
</assistant>
